obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat), ws.length = vs.length → ∃ (sel : Selection), ValidSelection ws sel ∧ totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap ∧ totalValue vs sel = knapsack01 ws vs cap
obligations.nl_gloss: When weights and values are length-aligned, there exists a valid feasible selection whose total value equals the returned result.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (ws : Weights) (vs : Values) (cap : Nat) (sel : Selection), ws.length = vs.length → ValidSelection ws sel → totalWeight ws sel ≤ cap → totalValue vs sel ≤ knapsack01 ws vs cap
obligations.nl_gloss: When weights and values are length-aligned, no valid feasible selection beats the returned result.
